briefdescription.para: Returns the existence of map property.
Returns the number of maps for the given property.

simplesect.para: The total count of mapping entries.

briefdescription.para: Is index idx valid for an array type property?

simplesect.para: An expression which evaluates to 1 if idx is a valid index into the given property, and 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the map property has any entries.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_HAS_ENTRY_BY_IDX with entry_idx set to zero.

simplesect.para: An expression which evaluates to 1 if idx is a valid index into the given property, and 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of child addresses.
Checks if the child address has the specified index.

parameterdescription.para: The index in the child addresses.
if the child address has the index, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the mapping entry has any child addresses.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_HAS_CHILD_ADDRESS_BY_IDX with param_idx set to zero.

parameterdescription.para: if the child address has the index, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Get the child address element from a mapping entry, by index.

parameterdescription.para: The index in the child addresses.

simplesect.para: The element of the specified position of the child addresses.

briefdescription.para: Get the first child address element from a mapping entry.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_CHILD_ADDRESS_BY_IDX with param_idx set to zero.

simplesect.para: The element of the specified position of the child addresses.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of child specifiers.
Checks if the child specifier has the specified index.

parameterdescription.para: The index in the child specifiers.
if the child specifier has the index, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the mapping entry has any child specifiers.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_HAS_CHILD_SPECIFIER_BY_IDX with param_idx set to zero.

parameterdescription.para: if the child specifier has the index, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Get the child specifier element from a mapping entry, by index.

parameterdescription.para: The index in the child specifiers.

simplesect.para: The element of the specified position of the child specifiers.

briefdescription.para: Get the first child specifier element from a mapping entry.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_CHILD_SPECIFIER_BY_IDX with param_idx set to zero.

simplesect.para: The element of the specified position of the child specifiers.

briefdescription.para: Extracts the parent node from a mapping entry.
Extracts the parent node from the first mapping entry.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_PARENT_BY_IDX with entry_idx set to zero.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of parent addresses.
Checks if the parent address has the specified index.

parameterdescription.para: The index in the parent addresses.
if the parent address has the index, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the mapping entry has any parent addresses.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_HAS_PARENT_ADDRESS_BY_IDX with param_idx set to zero.

parameterdescription.para: if the parent address has the index, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Get the parent address element from a mapping entry, by index.

parameterdescription.para: The index in the parent addresses.
element of the specified position of the parent addresses.

briefdescription.para: Get the first parent address element from a mapping entry.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_PARENT_ADDRESS_BY_IDX with param_idx set to zero.

parameterdescription.para: element of the specified position of the parent addresses.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of parent specifiers.
Checks if the parent specifier has the specified index.

parameterdescription.para: The index in the parent specifiers.
if the parent specifier has the index, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the mapping entry has any parent specifiers.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_HAS_PARENT_SPECIFIER_BY_IDX with param_idx set to zero.

parameterdescription.para: if the parent specifier has the index, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Get the parent specifier element from a mapping entry, by index.

parameterdescription.para: The index in the parent specifiers.
element of the specified position of the parent specifiers.

briefdescription.para: Get the first parent specifier element from a mapping entry.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling DT_MAP_ENTRY_PARENT_SPECIFIER_BY_IDX with param_idx set to zero.

parameterdescription.para: element of the specified position of the parent specifiers.

briefdescription.para: Invokes fn for each map entry in the map.
Invokes fn for each map entry in the map with separator.

parameterdescription.para: Separator (e.g. comma or semicolon). Must be in parentheses; this is required to enable providing a comma as separator.

briefdescription.para: Invokes fn for each map entry in the map with separator.

parameterdescription.para: variable number of arguments to pass to fn

briefdescription.para: Invokes fn for each map entry in the map with separator.

parameterdescription.para: Separator (e.g. comma or semicolon). Must be in parentheses; this is required to enable providing a comma as separator.
variable number of arguments to pass to fn
